concept: Corporate professional mobile-first web app, mimicking native React Native/Expo constraints. Uses a clean, card-based layout with deep contrast and minimalist geometry. Generous safe-area padding and thumb-friendly touch targets. Uses the 'Bento' and 'Control Room' grid approaches for widget dashboards.

layout_and_spacing.app_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-gray-50 relative pb-20 overflow-x-hidden shadow-2xl
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements, rounded-full for buttons

components_strategy.cards: Flat solid surfaces with 1px delicate border (`border-gray-200`), no drop shadows to maintain a clean Swiss look. `bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl`.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary: Solid black (`bg-black text-white rounded-full font-medium active:scale-95 transition-transform`). Secondary: Outline (`border border-gray-200 bg-white text-black rounded-full active:scale-95 transition-transform`).
components_strategy.bottom_navigation: Fixed bottom bar (`fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-gray-100 pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50`).
components_strategy.inputs: Clean, large touch targets. Shadcn `Input` with `h-12 rounded-xl border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black/5`.
components_strategy.tabs: Pill-shaped segmented controls. Active state: `bg-black text-white`. Inactive state: `text-gray-500 hover:text-black`.
components_strategy.modals_bottom_sheets: Use bottom-aligned Drawer/Dialog for detail views (e.g., Payslip details, Apply Leave). Must animate sliding up.

icons.instructions: Use consistent stroke width. For bottom nav: filled icon for active state (or strong black stroke), gray stroke for inactive.

login.layout: Full height, centered content, immersive background.
login.visuals: Abstract minimalist architecture background for corporate vibe.
login.components: Form container (`bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-2xl`), Inputs for ERPNext URL, API Key, API Secret, massive Login CTA.

components: Header: Greeting ('Good Morning, Jane') + User Avatar.
Hero Card (Attendance): Large live clock, current status badge (e.g. 'Checked In' in green), massive 'Check Out' action button.
Quick Stats Grid: Bento-style 2-column grid for 'Leaves Available' and 'Next Holiday'.
Recent Activity: Simple list of recent punches.
Balance Tab: Bento grid of circular progress rings or clean metric cards for Casual, Sick, Earned leaves.
Apply Tab: Form with full-width bottom CTA.
History Tab: List of cards with status pills (Approved=Green, Pending=Yellow, Rejected=Red).
List item: Month/Year, Net Pay (prominent), 'View Details' chevron.
Detail Sheet: Bottom sheet/modal containing Earnings/Deductions breakdown in a strict 2-column key-value list.
Header: Large Avatar, Name, Role, Employee ID.
List: Personal details, Company Details, Settings.
Logout: Prominent destructive button at the bottom.

image_urls.description: Minimalist geometric architecture for login screen background
Professional female avatar for profile and dashboard header

instructions_to_main_agent: Design specifically for a mobile layout using `max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-x-hidden`. This must feel like a native mobile app inside a web browser.
Avoid using complex Shadcn components that rely on desktop behaviors (like Select dropdowns that don't look native on mobile). Use bottom-sheet Dialogs/Drawers for selectors where possible.
Implement bottom navigation fixed to the bottom. Add padding to the bottom of the main content area (`pb-24`) so it's not obscured by the nav bar.
Strictly adhere to the selected fonts (Outfit & IBM Plex Sans). Import them from Google Fonts in `index.css`.
Add hover/active states that mimic native touch feedback (e.g., `active:scale-95 transition-transform`).
Make all touch targets at least 48x48px.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF for backgrounds if they touch. Use #F9FAFB for app background and #FFFFFF for cards.
Use data-testid exactly as specified for all interactive elements to support tests.
Since it's a mobile layout, DO NOT use Sidebar. DO NOT use desktop top-navs. Use only Bottom Navigation.
